security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com

bundle.longDescription: CW Master is a web-based Morse Code encoder and decoder supporting both traditional signal processing and deep learning. Based on web-deep-cw-decoder by e04. Enhanced by BY4CWY.
bundle.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 BY4CWY. Based on web-deep-cw-decoder by e04 (MIT License). Uses ONNX Runtime Web (Apache-2.0).
